action.name: message

args.content: I can't take on your work; I have my own part due today at 19:00. Please finish yours by tomorrow morning.

action.reasoning: g1 requires submission today; accepting g2 would delay g1. Messaging sets a boundary to protect the high-priority deadline while maintaining trust.
